Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Work Admission model · Theory Work Admission, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Limiting worker count bounds every downstream resource.
